def positive_bidirectional_import_between_feature_modules():
    rule_id = "bidirectional_import_between_feature_modules"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag feature modules that depend on each other directly."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
